title: Probability Calculator
description: Industrial-grade probability and risk assessment tool based on ISO 31000, Six Sigma, and Lean principles. Computes process failure probability, defect rates, and overall process capability.

inputs.label: Number of Defects
inputs.businessContext: Total observed defects in the sample or process period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total observed defects in the sample or process period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Numunede veya proses periyodunda gözlemlenen toplam kusur sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der beobachteten Fehler in der Stichprobe oder im Prozesszeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de défauts observés dans l'échantillon ou la période de processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de defectos observados en la muestra o período del proceso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي العيوب الملاحظة في العينة أو الفترة التشغيلية.

inputs.label: Sample Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units inspected or trials performed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units inspected or trials performed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İncelenen toplam birim sayısı veya yapılan deneme sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der geprüften Einheiten oder durchgeführten Versuche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités inspectées ou d'essais effectués.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades inspeccionadas o ensayos realizados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المفحوصة أو التجارب المنفذة.

inputs.label: Sigma Shift (1.5 for long-term)
inputs.businessContext: Standard shift to convert short-term capability to long-term (commonly 1.5).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard shift to convert short-term capability to long-term (commonly 1.5).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kısa dönem yeteneğini uzun döneme dönüştürmek için standart kayma (yaygın olarak 1.5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardverschiebung zur Umrechnung von Kurzzeit- in Langzeitfähigkeit (üblich 1,5).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage standard pour convertir la capabilité court terme en long terme (généralement 1,5).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento estándar para convertir capacidad a corto plazo en largo plazo (comúnmente 1.5).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التحول القياسي لتحويل القدرة قصيرة الأجل إلى طويلة الأجل (شائع 1.5).

inputs.label: Distribution Type
inputs.businessContext: Underlying statistical distribution for probability calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Underlying statistical distribution for probability calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Olasılık hesaplaması için temel istatistiksel dağılım.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zugrunde liegende statistische Verteilung für die Wahrscheinlichkeitsberechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distribution statistique sous-jacente pour le calcul de probabilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distribución estadística subyacente para el cálculo de probabilidad.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Desired confidence level for interval estimates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired confidence level for interval estimates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aralık tahminleri için istenen güven düzeyi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance souhaité pour les estimations par intervalle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de confianza deseado para estimaciones de intervalo.

inputs.label: Apply Historical Bias Correction
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a correction factor based on past process performance.

label_i18n.fr: Appliquer la correction de biais historique

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a correction factor based on past process performance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, geçmiş proses performansına dayalı bir düzeltme faktörü uygular.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, wird ein Korrekturfaktor basierend auf der bisherigen Prozessleistung angewendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique un facteur de correction basé sur les performances passées du processus.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica un factor de corrección basado en el rendimiento pasado del proceso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا كان صحيحًا، يطبق عامل تصحيح بناءً على أداء العملية السابق.

rules.message: Sample size must be greater than zero.
Defect count cannot exceed sample size.
Sigma shift must be between 0 and 3.

thresholds.alert: Defect rate exceeds 10% – immediate process review recommended.
Process capability (Cpk) below 1.33 – process not capable per Six Sigma standards.
Confidence interval width exceeds 20% – consider larger sample size.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
